fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Nuhky4zTzuANJ8kUYa5s-1" parent="1" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;html=1;fontSize=27;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;autosizeText=1;" value="Google Docs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Nuhky4zTzuANJ8kUYa5s-2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Requirements</h1><div><div><b>Functional Requirements</b></div></div><p></p><ol><li>User should be able to write</li><li>User should be able to remove, add or modify any already written text</li><li>other user should be able to write in same document con-currently</li></ol><div><br></div><div><b>Non Functional Requirements</b></div><div><ol><li>should scroll smoothly (60 FPS)</li><li>typed text should reflect on the web-page instantly</li></ol></div><p></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="260" x="50" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1QqdczRybNQaH0_Czadk-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Tech Stack</h1><p></p><ol><li>Framework: React (any, depends on the company's / team expertise)</li><li>DOM Element: Canvas</li><li>Communication Protocol: WebSocket, HTTP Request</li><li>State Management: custom store file (using useSyncExternalStore) or Redux</li></ol><p></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="270" x="50" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="<ol><li>Requirements</li><li>Tech Stack</li><li>Component Optimization&nbsp;</li><li>Accessibility</li></ol>" placeholders="1" name="Variable" id="1QqdczRybNQaH0_Czadk-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;html=1;fontSize=27;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;autosizeText=1;" value="Data Model" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="360" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1QqdczRybNQaH0_Czadk-10" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><b>Text content of the doc will be converted to this tree format to render it in canvas</b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><b>DocsData</b></div>{<div><span style="white-space: pre;">	totalHeight: number,</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	totalPages: number,</span><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	totalCharacters: number,</span><br></span></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	pages: Page[]</span><br></div><div>}</div><div><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><b>Page</b></span><br></div><div>{</div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	top: number,</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>bottom: number,</span><span style="white-space: pre;"><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	paras: Para[]</span><br></span></div><div>}</div><div><br></div><div><b>Para</b></div><div>{</div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	top: number,</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	bottom: number,</span><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	lines: Lines[],</span><br></span></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	charStartIdx: number,</span><br></span></span></span></div><div>}</div><div><b><br></b></div><div><b>Lines</b></div><div>{</div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	top: number,</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	bottom: number,</span><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	charStartIdx: number,</span><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><br></span></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	charEndIdx: number,</span><span style="white-space: pre;"><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	text: string,</span></span></span></div><div>}</div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="510" width="260" x="690" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1QqdczRybNQaH0_Czadk-11" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><b>Text content of the doc will be stored in this format</b><b><br></b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><b>Piece Table</b></div><div>{</div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	orgText: string,</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>addedText: string,</span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	pieces = Piece[]</span><br></span></div><div>}</div><div><br></div><div><b>Piece</b></div><div>{</div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	type : "org" | "added",</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	start: number,</span><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	length: number</span><br></span></span></div><div>}</div><div><br></div><div>e.g.&nbsp;</div><div>if the document has initially text "Hello World" and then x is added at index position 5 i.e. after o and before space then piece table will look like</div><div><br></div><div>{</div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	orgText: "Hello World"</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	addedText: "x",</span><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	pieces: [</span><br></span></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	{ </span></span></span></span><span style="white-space: pre;">type: "org", </span><span style="white-space: pre;">start: 0, </span><span style="white-space: pre;">length: 5 </span><span style="white-space: pre;">}, // "Hello"</span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	{ </span></span></span></span></span></span><span style="white-space: pre;">type: "added", </span><span style="white-space: pre;">start: 0, </span><span style="white-space: pre;">length: 1 </span><span style="white-space: pre;">}, // "x"</span></div><div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">		{ </span><span style="white-space: pre;">type: "org", </span><span style="white-space: pre;">start: 5, </span><span style="white-space: pre;">length: 6 </span><span style="white-space: pre;">}, // " World"</span></div></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	]</span><br></span></span></span></div><div>}</div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="450" width="310" x="360" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell onUpdate(Operation)<br></li><li>WS sendUpdate(Operation)</li></ol><div><br></div></div><div>Operation<br></div><div>{</div><div><span style="white-space: pre;">	type: INSERT | MODIFY | REMOVE,</span><br></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	index: number,</span><br></span></div><div><span style="white-space: pre;"><span style="white-space: ol.li: User should be able to write
User should be able to remove, add or modify any already written text
other user should be able to write in same document con-currently
typed text should reflect on the web-page instantly

div.div:
Text content of the doc will be converted to this tree format to render it in canvas
DocsData{
totalHeight: number,
totalPages: number,
totalCharacters: number,
pages: Page[]
}
Page
{
top: number,
bottom: number,
paras: Para[]
}
Para
{
top: number,
bottom: number,
lines: Lines[],
charStartIdx: number,
}
Lines
{
top: number,
bottom: number,
charStartIdx: number,
charEndIdx: number,
text: string,
}
